results.title: CISCO REPORTS SECOND QUARTER EARNINGS
results.snippet: Cisco reported Q2 FY 2026 revenue of $15.3 billion, up 10% year over year, with GAAP EPS of $0.80 (up 31%) and Non-GAAP EPS of $1.04 (up 11%).

results.title: Cisco Systems Inc. - Financials - Quarterly Results
results.snippet: Cisco's Q2 2026 earnings showed record revenue of $15.3 billion and EPS growth exceeding guidance ranges, with details on margins and future outlook.

results.title: Cisco (CSCO) Q2 earnings report 2026
results.snippet: Cisco beat estimates with adjusted EPS of $1.04 vs $1.02 expected and revenue of $15.35 billion vs $15.12 billion expected, with revenue growing 10% year over year.

results.title: Cisco Systems, Inc. Q2 2026 Earnings Call Summary
results.snippet: Q2 2026 results highlighted 10% revenue growth driven by AI infrastructure demand and Campus networking, with non-GAAP EPS up 11% despite some cash flow impacts.

results.title: Cisco Systems, Incorporated [CSCO] Q2FY26 Earnings ...
results.snippet: Cisco delivered Q2 revenue of $15.3B up 10% with product revenue up 14%, non-GAAP EPS of $1.04 up 11%, and strong orders growth particularly in AI infrastructure.

results.title: How Cisco's AI Infrastructure Orders and NVIDIA Alliance ...
results.snippet: Cisco Systems reported strong second-quarter fiscal 2026 results exceeding expectations, driven by subscription revenues and AI infrastructure orders in partnership with NVIDIA.

results.title: Cisco's AI Orders Hit $2.1 Billion in One Quarter
results.snippet: Cisco took in $2.1 billion in AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers in Q2 fiscal 2026. The company expects over $5 billion in AI orders for fiscal 2026, excluding some new products.

results.title: Cisco projects over $5B in AI orders for FY26 amid ...
results.snippet: Cisco anticipates over $5 billion in AI orders for fiscal year 2026 amid accelerated demand, product innovation, and record revenue growth.

results.title: Cisco's 2026 agenda prioritizes AI-ready infrastructure ...
results.snippet: Cisco's 2026 priorities focus on AI-ready infrastructure, connectivity, and partnerships like with Nvidia and VAST Data for integrated AI solutions.

results.title: Cisco's $2.1B AI Order Surge: Are we entering a new " ...
results.snippet: Cisco's Q2 2026 report revealed $2.1 billion in AI orders, sparking discussion on the economic implications of AI data center infrastructure investments.

results.title: Cisco's Networking Revenue Growth Picks Up
results.snippet: Cisco Systems' networking revenues hit $8.29 billion in Q2 fiscal 2026, up 21% year-over-year driven by demand for AI infrastructure and campus networking solutions.

results.title: CISCO REPORTS SECOND QUARTER EARNINGS
results.snippet: Cisco reported networking revenue of $8.294 billion for Q2 FY2026, a 21% increase, as part of overall product revenue growth amid strong orders.

results.title: cisco reports second quarter earnings
results.snippet: Cisco's Q2 FY2026 networking revenue was $8,294 million, up 21% year-over-year, contributing to total quarterly revenue of $15.3 billion.

results.title: Cisco (CSCO) Q2 earnings report 2026
results.snippet: For fiscal year 2026, Cisco guided toward $61.2 billion to $61.7 billion in total revenue, implying roughly 8.5% annual growth.

results.title: Cisco Revenue 2012-2026 | CSCO
results.snippet: Cisco's revenue for the twelve months ending January 31, 2026 reached $59.054 billion, with Q2 revenue at $15.349 billion.
